title: Senior Business Development Manager at DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF Consulting Pvt Ltd!
